summary_text: **Findings (body-text propagation only)** - The two target posts (`20260402-xauto-01`, `20260402-xauto-02`) in repo draft artifacts are not direct publish inputs. They are draft metadata in [20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json) and [20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json), both with `status=draft`, `posted=false`, and no `notion_page_id`. - Actual posting path uses external queue/runtime (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json`) where publisher reads `text` (not `body`/`body_ja`). Repo-side health check also validates this via [x-auto-health.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py). - Notion sync (Python path) maps Notion `Body` -> queue `text` in [/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py), and scheduler posts `due_post["text"]` in [/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py). - Worker path (TS) prefers `Body JA`, then falls back to `Body`, then posts that as `text` in [/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/worker/src/notion-client.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/worker/src/notion-client.ts) and [/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/worker/src/index.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/worker/src/index.ts). - So, to affect real publication, edits must land in the Notion row fields (`Body` / `Body JA`) and then flow into external queue `text`; editing repo draft JSON alone will not change what gets posted. - Contract/docs are consistent with Notion as source of truth: [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md), [x-auto-note-linking-rule.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md), [x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md).
